title: mollugo linearis
intro: Mollugo linearis, also known as carpet weed or creeping Charlie, is a type of flowering plant in the family Molluginaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and soothing digestive problems. Herbal preparations of Mollugo linearis include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be made by steeping the leaves and stems in hot water or a solvent like ethanol.
